articles.title: Hezbollah’s cheap, easy-to-get drones have Israeli soldiers diving for cover
articles.excerpt: Israel’s government says Hezbollah’s use of small commercial drones is a tactical concern, but not a game-changer. Nonetheless,  Israel says it will escalate its attacks on Lebanese targets to try to address the growing threat.
articles.content: Israel’s government says Hezbollah’s use of small commercial drones is a tactical concern, but not a game-changer. Nonetheless,  Israel says it will escalate its attacks on Lebanese targets to try to address the growing threat.

articles.title: Man denied dental coverage under national plan says insurer 'playing games' with Canadians
articles.excerpt: The Canadian Dental Care Plan is supposed to help millions of Canadians access dental care. But repeated denials of pre-authorization for more complex procedures, like crowns, is leaving both patients and dental providers baffled.
